steps.title: Separate contrasting clauses
steps.content: The sentence contrasts the Michelin Guide's current prestige with its modest origin as a marketing gimmick in 1900. The blank must both separate the two main clauses and signal that contrast clearly in standard punctuation.

steps.title: Reject weak punctuation
steps.content: B uses only a comma, creating a comma splice and losing the contrast signal. C still leaves a comma splice around "however." D gives no punctuation or contrast signal at all. The answer is A.
